case_title: GOLDEN GATE EQUIPMENT VS CASEY JOE DBA CASEY CONST.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,445.29 FILED BY GOLDEN GATE EQUIPMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CASEY JOE DBA CASEY CONST. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
